Hello! Nice to meet you, you can call me GAI.

If you're reading this, you are likely a contributor or manager of the pxt-arcade app that I have forked from. For the moment, I am taking my time to learn how pxt-arcade works, and then once I've learnt enough I will hopefully be able to start making changes to bring my idea to life!

I wish to create a "dual screen" Makecode Arcade type fork, that will give the user access to two screens. And it should be compatible with some kind of new product, that I will pitch to a company like Elecfreaks, who created the iconic Retro Arcade for Education.
